description: v1.1.0: Fixed Authorization header injection (Bearer token), added has_more field to output_schema.required. Fixes api_auth_failure and output_schema_mismatch.

evaluation.validation_summary: Experiment 2 full-chain case study; verified by Kiro harness agent.

implementation.prompt_template: Complete the API task for {endpoint} using validated {parameters}. Return JSON with result, evidence, and verifier, including required parameters and response assumptions.

endpoint.description: Endpoint, method, or tool call described by the API documentation.

parameters.description: Validated request parameters for the endpoint.

task.description: API task to complete from the imported API documentation.

evidence.description: Context-grounded evidence used by the Judge.

result.description: Structured result produced from the API documentation Skill.

verifier.description: Minimal verifier verdict, failure signal, or replay score for the result.

checked.description: Postconditions, constraints, paths, or evidence points checked.

failure_signal.description: Reason the verifier would reject the result.

passed.description: Whether the preview verifier accepts the result.

postconditions: output.data is a non-null list of model objects.
Each item in output.data contains a model id field.
output.has_more indicates whether additional pages exist.
preconditions: api_key is a valid Anthropic API key with models:read permission.

name: api_doc_list

creation_context.raw_content_preview:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Focused Anthropic API docs fixture - anthropic-list-models
  version: '1.0'
  description: Focused public API documentation excerpt normalized for SkillOS API-doc-to-skill testing.
servers:
  - url: https://example.invalid
paths:
  /v1/models:
    get:
      operationId: anthropic_list_models
      summary: List available models and metadata.
      parameters:
        - name: request_id
          in: header
          required: false
          schema: {type: string}
